api_key.description: Polygon.io API key, sent as a Bearer token (Authorization: Bearer <api_key>). Never logged.

base_url.description: Polygon.io API base URL override for tests or proxies.

page_size.description: Records per page (1-1000), sent as the 'limit' query param on the first request.

ticker.description: Optional ticker symbol filter, applied to all three streams.

market.description: Optional market filter (e.g. stocks, otc), applied to the tickers stream.

locale.description: Optional locale filter (e.g. us, global), applied to the tickers stream.

type.description: Optional ticker type filter (e.g. CS, ETF), applied to the tickers stream.

active.description: Optional active-tickers filter for the tickers stream; defaults to 'true' (matching legacy) when unset.

sort.description: Optional sort field, applied to all three streams.

order.description: Optional sort order (asc/desc), applied to all three streams.

ex_dividend_date.description: Optional ex-dividend date filter, applied to the dividends stream.

execution_date.description: Optional split execution date filter, applied to the splits stream.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
